title: Compact Mekanism Machines Plus
description: Add more compact mekanism multiblock machines.
body:
# Compact Mekanism Machines Plus

A mod that adds a new mechanism compact multiblock

Feature
Compact Fusion Reactor  
- A fusion reactor in one block.  
- Compatible with both air cooling and water cooling.  
- Can be ignited with laser or resistive heating device.  
- Almost all functions of the fusion reactor can be used.  

Source
github :[https://github.com/nanaios-modding/CompactMekanismMachinesPlus](https://github.com/nanaios-modding/CompactMekanismMachinesPlus)
